channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned scooter, 16th March
item.description:
Scooter has been abandoned at the end of Sidlaw House on Stamford Hill Estate. The number plate has been removed which makes me think it has been used for nefarious purposes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Portland Avenue, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamppost not working, 16th March
item.description:
Footbridge between 187 and 189 st Edmund’s road n9 that goes over train track. The lamppost is not working making it dark and dangerous when using footbridge.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Edmunds Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household waste by the recycling bin area, 16th March
item.description:
Uncollected commercial waste outside area beside children play area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lytham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Van, 16th March
item.description:
The van has been parked in front of my hse since last year and the man in question who owns the van has not made any attempts to remove the van. It has broken down since last year and has not removed from the front of my address.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Daubeney Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cracked uneven payment outside 40 & 42, 16th March
item.description:
The cracked slabs have been there for years. Really need replacing I have witnessed a child tripping recently
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sundridge Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge potholes in the bike lane that needs urgent fixing, 16th March
item.description:
I reporting this problem in spring 2025 and nothing has been done. I’m fed up of the constant flat tyres when it’s too busy to cycle on the pedestrian walkway. Please can you fix the cycle lane on this stretch. The whole bit is covered in potholes and is a safety hazard for children and adults who cycle this route to school.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Anchor Iron Wharf, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of rubbish everywhere!!!, 16th March
item.description:
Lots of rubbish all on the pavement blocking the walkway and making it hard for disabled users to wheel their wheelchairs! Had to help an elderly person today!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Azof Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paving slabs, 16th March
item.description:
The whole of st edmunds road n9 has very poor and dangerous pedestrian paving. It appears the soil has caused shrinkage and its caused a wave like affect on the paving slabs. I habe on many occasions slipped and am concerned about safety. It needs relaying similar that of galliard road N9.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Edmunds Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dunster gardens, 16th March
item.description:
Wooden pallet flytipped here
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plympton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Light pollution into our bedroom, 16th March
item.description:
We would appreciate for a shield or backplate to be installed so that our house (10 Beaulieu Ave) is protected from the bright light at night. Even with our blinds closed, we have a hard time covering the light.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaulieu Avenue, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside bin store on Long Walk - Westdale Rd end, 16th March
item.description:
A couple of cushions from a sofa, some rotting hardboard, a clothes drier and other rubbish have been dumped outside the bin store on Long Walk - Westdale Road end.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Long Walk, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Incorrect sign post, 16th March
item.description:
This was reported as per the picture but there is a missing sign still. This leads to Tovil Close and Seymour Villas and having the numbers helps and the signage is already very poor and people always have trouble, especially at night. Can this be looked into and the correct signposts be considered.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Seymour Villas, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstruction, 16th March
item.description:
Large people carrier parked on corner of Everest Rd on double yellow lines for over 6 months. This obscures visibility of oncoming vehicles upon leaving Everest Rd onto Lassa Rd. I have twice encountered two near misses. This is a significant hazard and there will be an accident if not moved. Vehicle has several parking tickets that have been ignored. Has been reported by others but no enforcement action taken by Council.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Everest Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light, 16th March
item.description:
Since last week the street hasn’t been working.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belmont Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed Vehicle blocking bin access, 16th March
item.description:
Unfamiliar and Untaxed Vehicle blocking bin access.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags dumped, 16th March
item.description:
It's a neat line but everybody in the surrounding flats has communal collection, so no bags!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 131, Grange Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cat was hit by car on the road., 16th March
item.description:
A cat was hit by a car and some passerbys knocked on our door to check if it was our cat. It is not and we don't know who the cat belongs to so making this report.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crossway, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Priory park road outside the fencing of ryde house, 16th March
item.description:
Flytipping Carpet and 2 rubbish bags

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load (Estates)

item.title: Trees are totally overgrown on footpath, 16th March
item.description:
Footpath is blocked by overhanging trees
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Post Hill, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter down length of combermere rd, 16th March
item.description:
Uber drivers and food delivery drivers park on Combermere rd and throw rubbish on the street. Litter dropped daily by children and parents going to Stockwell Primary School and Lansdowne School which are off Combermere Rd. Current cleaning schedule is inadequate. Requires daily litter picking. Reported multiple times to Streetcare every week but problem is getting worse rather than better. Unclear if litter pickers are picking up litter on this stretch of road. Please advise how to get more regular litter picking on the street which is urgently needed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
